# Docket

> AI-powered invoice processing for small businesses and bookkeepers.

Docket automates invoice data entry. Users upload PDF invoices, AI extracts vendor details, line items, and totals, and one click syncs the data to QuickBooks Online or Xero as a bill, check, or cash expense.

## Key Features
- AI extraction of invoice headers and line items from PDFs
- Side-by-side review UI with confidence scoring
- AI GL account inference that learns from corrections
- Vendor auto-matching
- QuickBooks Online and Xero integration
- Batch upload (up to 25 invoices)
- Bill, check, or cash expense creation
- PDF attachment to synced transactions

## Pricing
- Starter: $19/mo (75 invoices/month)
- Pro: $39/mo (150 invoices/month)
- Growth: $99/mo (500 invoices/month)
- Free trial: 10 invoices, no credit card required
- Annual billing saves 20%
